title: Full Funnel Conversion Audit
tagline: Map a complete funnel, find the biggest drop-offs, and design experiments.
scenario: An online insurance comparison site gets 200,000 visitors/month but only 400 completed quote requests (0.2% conversion). The funnel is: Landing Page → Quote Form Step 1 → Step 2 → Step 3 → Confirmation. The CEO wants to know where the biggest drop-off is and what to do about it.
brief: Map the complete funnel with hypothetical but plausible drop-off rates at each stage. Identify the biggest leak, diagnose the likely cause, and design an experiment to fix it.
deliverables: A funnel map with conversion rates at each stage (invented but internally consistent)
The biggest drop-off point identified with at least 3 hypotheses for why users abandon
A detailed experiment design for the highest-impact fix
A secondary optimisation opportunity at a different funnel stage
submissionGuidance: A 50% drop-off from Step 1 to Step 2 is more impactful than a 20% drop-off from Step 2 to Step 3, even if the percentage is smaller. Show that you calculate absolute user loss, not just percentages.

rubric.label: Funnel Mapping
rubric.description: Are the drop-off rates plausible and internally consistent?

rubric.label: Drop-Off Diagnosis
rubric.description: Are the hypotheses for abandonment specific and testable?

rubric.label: Experiment Design
rubric.description: Is the proposed experiment well-designed with clear metrics?

rubric.label: Impact Calculation
rubric.description: Does the candidate calculate the revenue impact of fixing the leak?
